# infisical_project_role (Data Source)

Look up a project role by project ID and slug. Returns null values if the role does not exist. Only Machine Identity authentication is supported for this data source.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    infisical = {
      # version = <latest version>
      source = "infisical/infisical"
    }
  }
}

provider "infisical" {
  host = "https://app.infisical.com" # Only required if using self hosted instance of Infisical, default is https://app.infisical.com
  auth = {
    universal = {
      client_id     = "<machine-identity-client-id>"
      client_secret = "<machine-identity-client-secret>"
    }
  }
}

data "infisical_project_role" "example" {
  project_id = "<project-id>"
  slug       = "<role-slug>"
}

output "role-id" {
  value = data.infisical_project_role.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) The ID of the project
- `slug` (String) The slug of the role

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the role. Null if the role does not exist.
- `id` (String) The UUID of the role. Null if the role does not exist.
- `name` (String) The name of the role. Null if the role does not exist.
